description_long: This barbell consists of a long, metallic shaft with multiple weight plates loaded symmetrically on each end. The plates are colored in red, green, blue, and yellow, with the largest red plates marked '25 Kg' and the green plates marked '10 Kg USA'. The shaft appears to be made of steel and is straight, connecting the two stacks of plates. The barbell is resting on a textured, square-patterned mat, suggesting it is set up for weightlifting or training. The weight plates are circular, flat, and have visible central holes for mounting on the shaft. The overall appearance is robust and professional, suitable for use in gyms, parks, or urban fitness areas.
description: A heavy-duty barbell with colorful weight plates and a steel shaft, resting on a textured mat. The plates are marked with their weights and country of origin.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barbell shaft and the full width of the weight plates, with red plates most prominent.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green '10 Kg USA' plate and the stacked arrangement of plates in various colors.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the opposite side of the barbell and the red plates.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the red '25 Kg' plate and the stacked arrangement of plates, with the shaft extending through the center.
attribute_knurled_grip_pattern: No visible knurled grip pattern on the shaft; the shaft appears smooth throughout its length with no distinct grip marks or rings.
attribute_presence_of_weight_plates: Weight plates are present on both sides: each side has at least four plates of varying sizes and colors, with the largest being red (25 Kg) and green (10 Kg).
attribute_central_rotating_sleeve: No clear evidence of a central rotating sleeve; shaft appears continuous with no visible seams or bushings at the plate interface.
attribute_end_cap_design: End caps are flat and circular, matching the color of the outermost weight plate (red or green), with large white weight markings and no visible fasteners or decorative elements.
